violations.text: At time of inspection, dish racks were stored in mop sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the hoods have a heavy accumulation of grease and soil residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

The walls in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Dishwasher was taken out of service for sanitizing. Establishment must use the 3-bay sink to sanitize. Please email inspector proof of repair/adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
